source_evidence.title: Fixture permit intake requirements
source_evidence.quote: Applicants must identify the property and provide project documents before permit intake.

source_evidence.title: Fixture permit filing boundary
source_evidence.quote: Permit submission and fee payment are official actions requiring applicant authorization.

required_user_facts.question: What is the project property's street address?
required_user_facts.reason: The property address is needed to identify the permitting path.

required_documents.question: Do you have a site plan or drawings for the proposed work?
required_documents.reason: Project documents are needed before drafting permit intake steps.

stale_evidence.message: Fixture source date is not verified against live PP&D pages.

next_safe_actions.label: Draft follow-up questions for the applicant
Submit the permit application
next_safe_actions.reason: Official submission is consequential and cannot be autonomous.

next_safe_actions.label: Pay permit fees
next_safe_actions.reason: Payment cannot be performed by the assistant.

blocked_actions.label: Schedule an inspection
blocked_actions.reason: The case lacks confirmed permit and applicant authorization.

source_evidence.title: Fixture autonomy guardrails
source_evidence.quote: Only reversible drafts may be prepared without explicit user confirmation.
